meaning: n.幼稚,孩子气,天真,未成熟
examples: Don't be fool anymore, just by your puerility, to control the disturbed soul.
There was always, in her conversation, the same odd mixture of audacity and puerility.
People change so quickly, just find I am so puerility that didn't know how to deal well with the relationship between people and made myself so hard.
